title: Drug and natural health products recall guide consultation - Canada.ca
content:
## Drug and natural health products recall guide consultation
Health  Canada is pleased to announce the release of the draft Drug and natural health  products recall guide (GUI-0039) for a sixty day public consultation from November  15, 2018 to January 14, 2019. This document, Draft  – Drug and natural health products recall guide , interprets sections of the Food and Drugs Act and Regulations  that pertain to the recall of drugs and natural health products. Guidance documents like this one are meant to help industry and health care  professionals understand how to comply with regulations. They also provide  guidance to Health Canada staff for fair and consistent compliance and enforcement  across Canada.
The information in the guidance document, Draft - Drug  and natural health products recall guide, states acceptable practices to  facilitate compliance with the Food and Drugs Act, the Food and Drug  Regulations and the Natural Health Products Regulations in the context of a  recall of drugs or natural health products. This includes roles and  responsibilities and guidance around the recall process.
This guidance document is intended to replace an  existing Health Canada webpage, Product Recall Procedures that was issued in  1993. It complements the Recall Policy POL-0016, issued March 5, 2015.The  document was previously published for consultation in 2008; stakeholders are  being consulted now due to changes in format and content as well as the length  of time since the previous consultation.
We  are consulting with industry members, associations and the general Canadian  public.
Health  Canada invites stakeholder's comments on the draft guidance document: Drug and  natural health products recall guide.

## Public consultation on draft guidance document
Request a copy of the  draft guidance: Interested stakeholders who  wish to provide comments may send a request for an electronic copy or alternate  format of the document to hc.hpce-cpsal.sc@canada.ca .
Please include in  the subject line, the title and the preferred language of the consultation  document you wish to receive.
Provide comments: Interested stakeholders may provide comments by email to hc.hpce-cpsal.sc@canada.ca .
Please include in the subject line, the title of  the consultation document for which you are providing comments.
Feedback  on the public consultation  will be collected  between November 15, 2018 and January  14, 2019.
Comments  received from stakeholders will be reviewed after the 60 day consultation period.  Health Canada will review and consider all comments received from the  consultation. The final version of the Drug and natural health products recall  guide will be published online.
Read our draft guidance document and provide your comments by email to: hc.hpce-cpsal.sc@canada.ca .
Product Recall Procedures Recall Policy
Any questions or  comments should be addressed to hc.hpce-cpsal.sc@canada.ca .
